name: bifromq
desc: Apache BifroMQ (Incubating) is a high-performance, distributed MQTT broker that natively supports multi-tenancy. It is designed to enable the building of large…
descFull: Apache BifroMQ (Incubating) is a high-performance, distributed MQTT broker that natively supports multi-tenancy. It is designed to enable the building of large-scale IoT device connectivity and messaging systems.
